props.name: horizontalBeamOffset
props.description: Horizontal offset of the beam (0–1 of canvas width).

props.name: verticalBeamOffset
props.description: Vertical offset of the beam (0–1 of canvas height).

props.name: horizontalSizing
props.description: Horizontal sizing factor of the beam footprint.

props.name: verticalSizing
props.description: Vertical sizing factor of the beam footprint.

props.name: flowSpeed
props.description: Speed of the beam’s flow modulation.

props.name: flowStrength
props.description: Strength of the beam’s flow modulation.

props.name: fogScale
props.description: Spatial scale for the fog noise.

props.name: fogFallSpeed
props.description: Drift speed for the fog field.

props.name: mouseTiltStrength
props.description: How much mouse x tilts the fog volume.

props.name: decay
props.description: Beam decay shaping for sampling envelope.

props.name: falloffStart
props.description: Falloff start radius used in inverse-square blending.

props.name: dpr
props.description: Device pixel ratio override (defaults to window.devicePixelRatio).
